name: Audio Diarization
description: This node processes audio files to transcribe and diarize speech, identifying different speakers in the audio. It generates a structured output as a DataFrame with two columns: speaker and dialogue.
input: It takes directory or path as an input
output: Outputs a Dataframe with 2 columns speaker and dialouge

fields.name: audioFilePath
fields.title: Directory Or File Path
fields.description: Path to an audio file or a directory containing audio files to be processed. Supports batch processing when a directory is provided.

fields.name: numSpeakers
fields.title: Number of Speakers
fields.description: Expected number of distinct speakers in the audio. Providing an accurate estimate improves diarization accuracy.

fields.name: diarization
fields.title: Diarization
fields.description: Enable speaker diarization to segment the transcription by speaker identity. When disabled, the output contains plain transcription only.

fields.name: saveOutputPath
fields.title: Output Save Path
fields.description: Destination path to save the generated transcription as a text file. Useful for archiving or downstream consumption.

fields.name: context
fields.title: Additional Context
fields.description: Optional contextual information about the conversation (e.g., meeting type, participants, domain). Helps improve transcription and speaker attribution quality.

fields.name: llmConnection
fields.title: Select Connection
fields.description: Select the configured OpenAI connection containing API credentials and access settings.

fields.name: openaiModel
fields.title: OpenAI Model
fields.description: Speech-to-text model used for transcription and diarization. Choose a model optimized for audio quality and language support.
